releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Temporarily ship without artifact attestations: the community submission checker currently rejects attestations that `gh attestation verify` accepts, and a missing attestation is a non-blocking recommendation. Attestations will return once the checker verifies them correctly.
- Release assets remain stamped with the release version so they are byte-unique per release.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial public release 🎉

**Property Kanban** — a kanban task board for Obsidian driven entirely by note frontmatter properties.

## Highlights

- Kanban board grouped by any frontmatter field, with drag & drop that updates note properties
- Two-dimensional swimlane view (lane × column)
- Card creation with value suggestions from existing tasks
- Quick action button to set a property with one click
- Parent/child links between tasks via frontmatter wikilinks
- UI in English, with Japanese localization following the Obsidian interface language
